LST850: The Women's Sport-Wick Stretch 1/4-Zip is the single highest-earning garment in our shop's records — over 1,700 embroidered across nearly 300 orders. It's the smooth, stretchy quarter-zip that office teams, medical groups, and school staffs standardize on: flattering cut, wicking fabric, and a chest panel that takes an embroidered logo perfectly. Order it with the unisex ST850 and the whole team matches.
ST850: The Sport-Wick Stretch 1/4-Zip is the quarter-zip that conquered the Northwest office — over 1,600 through our embroidery heads across 250-plus orders. Smooth stretch knit, clean collar, professional everywhere from clinic to job trailer. It's the default answer when a company says 'we want quarter-zips,' and its women's twin LST850 is our top earner outright.
ST253: The 1/4-Zip Sweatshirt is the fleece cousin of Sport-Tek's famous stretch quarter-zip — warmer, softer, still office-appropriate. Over 900 decorated across 80 orders; teams that love the ST850 add this for winter and keep the same logo placement.
ST460: The Digi Camo Tee moves in serious volume — nearly 1,500 units here, mostly in big event runs. It's a wicking performance tee in digital camouflage; the pattern hides sweat and wear, and a solid-color print sits boldly on top. Fun runs, crews, and outdoor events order it by the case.
ST350LS: The long-sleeve PosiCharge Competitor carries our best-selling performance tee into cold-morning coverage — 500-plus decorated, at one of the strongest margins in the activewear wall. Same locked-in colors that survive industrial laundry, same soft-hand printability, sleeves for the other six months.
STC39: The YP Classics Retro Trucker is the trucker cap our customers ask for by look rather than name — the true retro profile with the foam front. Over 600 decorated across 39 orders at nearly 73% margin, which makes it the quiet hero of our cap wall. Patches and bold front embroidery both land perfectly.
LST469: The Women's Endeavor 1/2-Zip is a tailored half-zip with texture — 340-plus embroidered across 41 orders. It reads a step dressier than a standard quarter-zip, which is why front-office and healthcare teams keep picking it. Pairs with the unisex ST469 for full-team programs.
ST469: The Endeavor 1/2-Zip brings subtle heathered texture to the team quarter-zip formula — 78 separate orders through our shop, the pattern of a piece that gets reordered on sight. It layers clean over a polo, and the textured face gives embroidery a premium backdrop.
ST266: The Crewneck Sweatshirt is Sport-Tek's clean athletic crew — no hood, no zip, just a smooth fleece canvas that takes big printed graphics and left-chest embroidery equally well. Nearly 300 decorated; schools and rec programs are the core buyers.
LST700: The Women's Ultimate Performance V-Neck moves in roster quantities — 600-plus units across 42 orders. It's the women's wicking tee that teams, gyms, and event crews order when 'unisex small' isn't an answer. Soft-hand prints keep it light.
ST283: The Super Heavyweight 1/4-Zip Pullover is the warmest quarter-zip Sport-Tek makes — sweatshirt-weight fleece under a zip collar. Two hundred-plus decorated for crews that work outside; it's the cold-weather upgrade path from the everyday ST253.
ST225: The PosiCharge Electric Heather Fleece Hooded Pullover took a single 190-unit order almost immediately — the electric heather surface looks custom off the shelf, and the color-locked fleece survives team laundry. A bold print over that heather reads like pro merch.
K469: The Dri-Mesh Polo is a Sport-Tek institution — the double-layer mesh polo that's been on golf courses and service routes for two decades. Nearly 300 embroidered here across 51 orders; it's the proven wicking polo for teams that want a known quantity.
T200: The Colorblock Raglan Jersey is the classic baseball tee — contrast raglan sleeves, athletic drape, instant team look. 330-plus printed here; leagues, breweries, and event crews use it when the shirt itself should look like sports.
ST249: The Tech Fleece Colorblock 1/4-Zip Hooded Sweatshirt stacks features — hood, quarter zip, colorblocked tech fleece. It's the sideline piece for teams that want gear looking engineered; 38 orders say it works. Embroidery rides the solid chest panel.
F244: The Sport-Wick Fleece Hooded Pullover is the performance hoodie — wicking fleece that stays lighter and drier than cotton blends. Two hundred-plus decorated for training programs and active crews; prints and embroidery both behave on the smooth face.
ST258: The Full-Zip Hooded Sweatshirt is Sport-Tek's team zip hoodie — athletic cut, smooth fleece, easy on-off over gear. It fills the zip slot in school and club programs with numbers, names, and chest marks.
T475: The Dry Zone Raglan Polo is the loose-fit wicking polo — cut roomier than the fashion polos, which is exactly why service crews and coaching staffs order it. 230-plus embroidered across 48 orders; it's a workhorse.
STC17: The Flexfit Performance Solid Cap is the fitted performance cap of our Sport-Tek wall — Flexfit band, wicking fabric, two sizes to cover a roster. Two hundred-plus decorated; the structured front takes clean, dimensional embroidery.
ST700: The Ultimate Performance Crew is Sport-Tek's everyday wicking tee at a full-roster price — 300 units across 31 orders here. It's the practice-shirt default: light, quick-drying, and friendly to soft-hand prints in team colors.
ST450LS: The Long Sleeve PosiCharge Competitor Cotton Touch adds a cotton-feel face to the wicking long sleeve — performance that doesn't feel like plastic. Big-batch buyers grabbed 240 units fast; it prints beautifully for a performance fabric.
STC43: The YP Classics Curve Bill Snapback pairs the classic snapback fit with a curved bill — the retro cap for heads that never took to flat brims. 240 decorated at strong margin; patches and embroidery both suit the structured front.
JST70: The Full-Zip Wind Jacket is the sideline shell — light, wind-blocking, packable, with that unmistakable warmup-jacket look. A hundred-plus decorated for teams and event staffs; a left-chest logo plus a back print completes it.
STC40: The Flexfit Air Mesh Back Cap combines the fitted Flexfit band with a full mesh back — the performance trucker. Nearly 200 decorated here; it's the summer counterpart to the solid Flexfit cap, same sharp embroidery up front.
TST650: The tall cut of our most-embroidered polo — the Micropique Sport-Wick with genuine tall proportions so the hem stays put on 6'4" frames. A hundred-plus decorated alongside regular-cut orders; same wicking knit, same logo, right length.
ST450: The PosiCharge Competitor Cotton Touch Tee wraps wicking performance in a cotton-like hand — the answer for crews that reject 'plasticky' athletic shirts. Two hundred units moved here in short order; prints sit soft and bright on it.
ST640: The PosiCharge RacerMesh Polo is the most breathable polo Sport-Tek makes — full micro-mesh construction for staff who work outside in summer. 135 embroidered here; the locked colors survive relentless washing.
ST655: The Side Blocked Micropique Sport-Wick Polo adds contrast side panels to our best-selling polo formula — a sportier look for teams that find solids too plain. 36 separate orders; embroidery rides the solid chest exactly like the ST650.
LST76: The Women's Colorblock Hooded Raglan Jacket is a wind-shedding warmup with contrast raglan styling — a hundred-plus decorated, mostly for teams and school programs. It's the women's sideline jacket in our Sport-Tek lineup.
ST420: The Posi-UV Pro Tee brings sun protection to the performance-tee wall — UV-rated wicking fabric for crews and events in full exposure. 42 separate orders in quick succession; it's becoming the summer-event default.
STC22: The Flexfit Cool & Dry Poly Block Mesh Cap is the venting workhorse of the Flexfit family — wicking crown, mesh sides, fitted feel. A hundred-plus decorated; it pairs naturally with performance-polo programs.
L474: The Women's Dri-Mesh Pro Polo is the tailored cut of Sport-Tek's classic double-mesh polo — the proven wicking fabric in a women's fit with a flattering placket. Teams running the K469 add it so the program fits everyone.
ST981: The Soft Shell Vest is Sport-Tek's layering shell — wind-blocking core warmth with a clean chest panel that embroiders like a dream. Sixty-plus decorated, mostly office and field-service teams adding a vest tier to their program.
F282: The Super Heavyweight Full-Zip Hooded Sweatshirt is the zip cut of Sport-Tek's warmest fleece — 24 separate orders, mostly crews working outdoors through winter. It's the heavyweight zip for teams that found standard hoodies too light.
ST400: The PosiCharge Tri-Blend Wicking Raglan Tee crosses tri-blend softness with locked-in color — a performance tee that drapes like retail. Ninety-plus printed; it's the piece for teams that want athletic function without the athletic look.
YST56: The Youth Waterproof Insulated Jacket sold 40 of its 64 units in separate orders — that's parents ordering one at a time for the sideline. Genuinely waterproof, genuinely warm, sized for kids who stand in Northwest rain all season. Team logos embroider on the chest.
STA06: The Gameday Scarf is the team-store sleeper — a knit spirit scarf in team colors that turned into a 120-unit seller here almost overnight. Embroidered or woven-look ends make it feel big-league; schools and clubs order them for the stands.
ST405: The PosiCharge Tri-Blend Wicking Polo carries the soft tri-blend performance formula into a collar — a polo that feels like a favorite tee but presents like staff wear. Ninety-plus decorated; tone-on-tone embroidery suits its heathered face.
ST460LS: The Long Sleeve Digi Camo Tee extends the big-volume camo performance tee into cold weather — same digital pattern, same wicking build, sleeves for the season. It runs one of the highest margins in the activewear wall.
